transcript.text:
That's a lot of food...!
How many servings is that!!
It's 4.4kg
(You can't help but smile at today's meal)
Wow, the bossam* looks very delicious *Korean Boiled Pork
(This isn't any ordinary bossam...!)
(Ever since they opened in 1975,)
('Won Halmeoni Bossam' left a huge mark in our bossam history)
(And with a new smokey stir-fried squid dish,)
(we have a collab you've only dreamed of)
(The burst of flavors unite with a wrap)
('Won Halmeoni Bossam' isn't just good at making bossam...)
Everybody think the founder's last name was Won
But it's actually ***!
(And we also learn a shocking truth...!) Then why is it called 'Won' Halmeoni?
Hello, everyone

Today, I'm here to eat
a very famous bossam
It's so famous,
every Korean knows it
and calls it the national bossam place
(Even Tzuyang frequently visited this place...) I also visited here a lot when I was young, and it's been so long I've been here
(Korea's national bossam, 'Won Halmeoni Bossam')
I'm excited to eat their bossam again after so long
Squid!
That looks tasty
('Won Halmeoni Bossam' is famous for its kimchi) I'm here to try their new menu item
(New item, Fire Squid Won Ssam)
Look at that logo!
It's been so long since I saw it!
(Come inside, now!)
(Entered the store) Hello

- Nice to meet you - Hello
- It's an honor...! - Thank you
(It's always embarrassing to get praised) You look so thin in person
- I was very surprised - You flatter me
- The menu... - Yes
(New item, Fire Squid Won Ssam) Is this the new menu item with the squid?
Yes, it's our newly released item
Does it come with bossam?
- Yes, it comes with bossam! - Oh, with bossam!
(Highly recommended) I recommend trying it out
- Oh, there's also jokbal* - Yes *Braised pig trotters
How long has been
- (Help) - 'Won Halmeoni Bossam' in business?
35 years?!
48 years!!
(That long...?) 48 years?

We started in 1975...
(Since 1975, it's been in business for 48 years...!) It's been open for 48 years
(Since 1975, it's been in business for 48 years...!) Yes, it's 48 years
Wow, that's so long
Are there any side dishes
you'd like to recommend?
(Recommending the addictive perilla oil makguksu*) Try the perilla oil makguksu *Buckwheat Noodle Dish
It's strangely addictive
- Give it a taste - Oh, once you eat it, you can't stop
And the doenjangsulbap*! *Doenjang soybean paste soup made with rice
It's a nice drinking snack!
(Ears perked) A drinking snack?
Then I'll have the doenjangsulbap
and the perilla oil makguksu
And I want the new menu item
I want two large servings of it

Two large servings?
Yes, and then,
- I want a regular serving of jokbal - Jokbal
Are you... eating it all by yourself?
Yes
(Surely...)
(Even after 48 years, people still love)
(the way 'Won Halmeoni Bossam' cooked in 1975)
(They preserved their ordinary bossam recipe since 1975)
(And today's new menu item will breathe new life into their tradition)
(Enjoy a spicy stir-fried squid dish with added charred flavor)
(Fire Squid Won Ssam)
(Don't assume they only have tasty bossam)
(The tender jokbal melts in your mouth)
(We have a full 'Won Halmeoni Bossam' feast)
(And the wraps are ready to make the bossam even tastier)

(The Won Ssam arrived) Wow, it's the Won Ssam!
(Setting up the Won Ssam...)
Thank you
(Setting up the Won Ssam...)
(The Won Ssam is fully set!) The table legs might snap from all the weight
(The boiled meat is kept warm with a gentle flame!)
Thank you haha
Look how moist the meat is
(It's so glistening...!) Judging by the surface, it looks so juicy
(The Fire Squid Won Ssam has no radish kimchi, you can order extra bossam kimchi) This item doesn't come with the kimchi
But 'Won Halmeoni Bossam' is very famous for their kimchi
So the restaurant gave me some kimchi
to give it a taste
Thank you
What should I eat first?
I'll start with a slice of bossam

(How will the bossam taste...?) I can't remember the last time I ate bossam
It's so delicious...!
Since it's been so long,
the texture of the meat feels so amazing
The fat part is tender and it isn't too greasy
And
the lean meat is very bouncy and chewy
Even when I eat it by itself,
it's a bit seasoned!
It doesn't taste bland and dry
The juice and fat
in the meat makes nice and moist,
and it has a very intense savory flavor
It's so delicious
(Special new menu item) This is the new menu item,
and the bossam came out with it

Wow, there are whole squids in it!
(The Fire Squid Won Ssam has plenty of plump squids) How many squids are there?
I'll eat the squid with the bossam
(The squid is already delicious by itself...)
(And here are tteok wraps) The tteok wraps would be delicious with it
It's the signature wrap of 'Won Halmeoni Bossam'
I used to love visiting here because of it
(Assembling the 'Won Halmeoni Combo' with bossam, squid, and tteok wrap!) Let's wrap it with a squid and bossam slice
That looks so delicious!
Wow, the stir-fried squid has a smokey flavor
Mm, the sauce is so tasty
This time, I'll use a green wrap
(Squid) Do they taste different?
(Bossam) And you
This is a real samhap* *Seafood-Meat-Kimchi Combination
The tteok wrap makes an amazing samhap

The sauce is sweet and spicy,
and it's something everybody can enjoy eating
Let's get a tteok wrap
Place the bossam
(And the crunchy radish kimchi...!)
You have to eat it this way
It's the original recipe!
So tasty
It's good
This is the extra kimchi
'Won Halmeoni Bossam' is famous for their kimchi
Let's place a slice of bossam on top
It's like...
a flavor you can't mess up
The kimchi is a bit sweet,
the seasoning itself is so tasty

By the way,
the new menu item is so amazing
The added squid creates
(Perfect Harmony) an amazing combination
Wow, personally,
I already like eating bossam with kimchi,
(Finishing touch!) but it's even better with the stir-fried squid
'Won Halmeoni Bossam'
is actually famous for their wraps
(Make wraps in ten different ways) They have so many types of wraps,
so even with the same food,
you can enjoy all sorts of combinations
This time, I'll have a lettuce wrap!
Radish wrap!
Let's add two slices
These are cabbage wraps!

They aren't ordinary napa cabbages
They're pickled cabbages
Personally,
the tteok wrap wins first place
The employee lighted the bossam earlier
to keep it warm
It's still warm as if it's just served
Look at the steam
(Tzu-torcycle)
Place some chives on top
and dip it in the salted shrimp
The bossam at the bottom would be warmer
(Get warmer) I'll move these over here
Wow, there's so much food
One serving of bossam meat is 650g
But before we boil it,

it's about 1.3kg
One dish is 1.3kg!
Two dishes are 2.6kg!
(If we combine the weight of the uncooked jokbal and bossam...)
It's 4.4kg
(How is that real...?)
That's a lot of food!!
How many servings is that!!
How many servings is it?
Four servings
Another four servings
This is also about three to four servings
And if we add the stir-fried squid,
it's 13 to 14 servings
(The owner always talks about Tzuyang) Every day, he talks my ear off
- That's how much he talked about you - Really?

(True fan) (Embarrassed)
(The praises never stopped coming...) He said you're pretty and you eat a lot of food
- It's an honor to serve you! - I'm so embarrassed
(Shy) This is so flattering...
Enjoy your meal
Thank you
I'll slice one more squid
(Can't stop eating the Fire Squid Won Ssam) The squid is so tasty
(The samhap combination is surely the best!) Squid
This is today's best combination
I'll also try out the jokbal
(The tender jokbal is the permanent fixture of 'Won Halmeoni Bossam') I'll dip the jokbal in the salted shrimp
Even the jokbal is delicious...!
The collagen part is so chewy
Nice and chewy!
If you see

the menu items of this place,
it's perfect for group dining
(Conditions for a good group dining place) It has to be easy to eat
and stay warm until you're done eating
Her's how the tteok tastes
Let's eat one more
It's so good
The tteok is so chewy,
and it has a subtle savory flavor to it
There are so many types of kimchi
and wraps available,
but the tteok wrap is so delicious
(Tzu-nos failed) It's not perfectly balanced
Are these pickled onions?
Ma'am!
The tteok wrap is so delicious,

(Extra tteok wrap) so I'd like one more serving...
Pink!
There's also pink tteok wraps?
Oh, that sounds fun
Do the tteok wraps taste different?
- Okay - The pumpkin tteok is yellow,
- So the pumpkin tteok is yellow - Yes
- The mugwort tteok is green - The mugwort tteok is green
(The eastern prickly pear tteok is green) And the eastern prickly pear...
How long did you sell food here?
About 18 years
- Only counting 'Won Halmeoni Bossam'?! - Yes
Then...
Did you also meet Grandma Won* in person? *'Won Halmeoni'
(Of course!) I did
Really?

Everybody thinks
the founder's last name was Won
(Shocking truth) It's actually Kim!
- Then why is it called 'Won' Halmeoni? - Her name is Kim Bo-bae!
(So many fake 'Kim Halmeoni' places appeared...) Too many people tried to copy her name,
so she added 'Won' that means 'original'
to name her restaurant 'Won Halmeoni Bossam'
(The most shocking fact of 2023 ...) Oh, the 'Won' stands for original
At Cheonggye 8-ga...
she opened her restaurant
without even a sign and just with barrels in 1975
(Her signature bossam got famous) And everybody said it was so delicious,
(That's how 'Won Halmeoni Bossam' started) which is how it all started
Thank you
(The colorful tteok wraps please both the eye and mouth) Wow, it's really pink
Tteok wrap!

I'll try eating just the pink tteok wrap
Each color has a different flavor!
Oh, it's tasty
I'll now eat it with kimchi
It's also delicious with kimchi
The restaurant puts in
(The harmony between tradition and technology) a lot of effort to maintain
(is created with the 48-year-old recipe and the delayed-aging technique) the original flavor they made in the past
If you eat the pork with pickled radish,
since the radish wrap is so watery,
it makes the pork feel even juicer
So it gets more delicious
These tteok wraps will keep reminding me
of this restaurant
And the squid...
wrap tteok(?)

(She kept calling them tteok wraps...) Oh, tteok... Tteok wrap?
I'm getting confused
(The pink tteok wrap hit the spot...!) The pink one is good
Since I like
the radish wrap
and the tteok wrap,
(Combine) let's try eating them together
(Two Wrap Fusion)
(Satisfied)
Now I'll add some noodles
(Noodles are a must...!)
(Doenjangsulbap) Wow, thank you
(The soup is also a must...!) That looks so tasty
- It's very hot - Yes
Wait, I'll try the noodles first!
I added noodles to the squid,

but I think it'll also be delicious with rice
(Can't resist this appetizing appearance...!)
The stir-fried squid
is so good,
you'd think you're at a fried-squid restaurant!
Wow, the added noodles
are surprisingly spicy
Delicious!
The soup
is boiled with rice,
so the broth is very thick
It's so tasty!!
Yeah
Wow
That's some tasty meat-
Wait, there's boiled pork in the soup!

That's so cost-efficient!
There's rice...
See.
the doenjang jjigae soup also has boiled pork
(The doenjangsulbap is cost-effective and hearty) There's potatoes, my favorite, and boiled pork
It's so delicious
Small jokbal!
I like collagen,
so I really love small jokbal
The jokbal seasoning is so tasty
It's a blessing that she can eat so well!
She doesn't get fat!
But us...
(Straight to the belly...) Even if we eat little, our bellies get so fat...
You're even prettier than in the YouTube videos!
(On-scene examination) Are you really this thin?

(What is she checking...?)
Oh my gosh...
(BMI Check) Her bones are sticking out
My bones..!
By the way, is it good?
It's so delicious!
It's really delicious!
(Out of nowhere?!) Can you make me a wrap?!
(Can't tell unless I eat it myself!)
(Gulp...) I'll make it like this
(Large bite)
This...
is really delicious...!
(Now she learned the charms of tteok wrap!) So this is why they serve the tteok!
You never ate it as a wrap?
- Are you related to 'Won Halmeoni Bossam'...? - No

Where are you from?
I just saw you recording and walked in!
What?!
(Is this for real?) You were just passing by, and you walked in?
Thank you for the delicious food
(She knows how to appreciate others) No, thank you
- (Bye) - Have a nice day
Do you know her...?
She works in the kitchen!
(She was just pranking us...?) Isn't she cheeky?
I was also surprised
She works in the kitchen, but she doesn't know
why the tteok is served! Hahaha
(I thought it was just a side dish) So this is why they serve the tteok!
(Back to business)
(Cheeky mode ON) I'm here to see you again

This is the last tteok wrap
It's so pretty
(Finishing the doenjangsulbap...)
Ta-da
The makguksu just came out,
so I cleaned up the table
I also got some jokbal for dessert
That's the perilla oil makguksu!
- Perilla oil makguksu? - Yes
(The cool perilla oil makguksu is popular in summer) It's a summer exclusive item
(This) The bowl in front is pork broth
If you pour it in the makguksu,
you can enjoy two different flavors
Let's give the broth a taste
It's similar to
the refreshing, warm broth of Pyeongyang naengmyeon* *Korean cold noodles

(The perilla oil makguksu goes well with bossam, and it's perfect to eat on a hot summer day)
For dessert...
(It's the best)
It's very savory
This is perfect for dessert
(Here's some cool broth for the makguksu) Here it is
Thank you
(Transform)
Makguksu with broth
It's like...
The broth doesn't change the flavor of the perilla oil makguksu too much
(A spoonful of coolness!) And the broth makes it nice and cool
It goes so well with the noodles!
(Highly recommended as a summertime dessert) I really recommend the makgukcu
Wow, she ate so much food!
She ate over 40 tteok wraps

(More than four rice bowls worth of tteok wraps...!) 10 tteok wraps is like one rice bowl
(No way) Oh, really?
(All clear) Ah, that was good
I came here to try out the new menu item
The squid and bossam went so well together
('Won Halmeoni Bossam' samhap of happiness) Especially the tteok wrap, bossam, and squid samhap
was truly the best
(Won Bossam is the best) 'Won Halmeoni Bossam'
I had
another great meal
